name: prompt-coach
description: Loopdeck is a local-first agent loop memory and meta-prompting workbench for Codex, Claude Code, and coding-agent workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first agent loop memory for coding-agent workflows
interface.longDescription: Loopdeck captures prompts and loop metadata from supported coding agents through local hooks, redacts sensitive values before storage, indexes Markdown and SQLite locally, and exposes MCP/CLI workflows for loop briefs, prompt coaching, memory approval, and project instruction review.
defaultPrompt: Set up prompt-coach for this machine
Check whether prompt-coach is capturing Codex prompts
Show my prompt-coach hook rewrite-guard mode
Toggle the prompt-coach rewrite guard between off / context / ask / block-and-copy
Show my prompt-coach buddy side pane command
Run my full prompt coach workflow
Judge my low-scoring prompts with the active agent session
